name: E2E: all 118 corpus rules map to a runnable enforcement tool or bundle with the original detector preserved as the first required binding — no rule is unrouted and no enforcement was dropped in the axis migration
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-applies-to-parity.sh" 2>p.txt; pe=$?; [ "$pe" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green rules=118 parity_fail=0 unrouted=0' p.txt && echo every-rule-routable-parity 1>&2
